Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly focuses on GIS, WebGIS, and GNSS, which are enabling technologies for developing and managing quality, reliable, and sustainable infrastructure (Target 9.1) and fostering innovation (Target 9.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: GIS data analysis methods can be applied to map and analyze spatial inequalities, indirectly supporting policies to promote social and economic inclusion (Target 10.2).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course provides core GIS skills directly applicable to sustainable urban planning, land management ('國土資訊系統'), and real estate, which are key to Target 11.3.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's focus on '國土資訊系統' and data analysis provides tools for monitoring and managing natural resources, supporting sustainable management and efficient use (Target 12.2).

Climate Action.reason: GIS analytical methods ('向量資料分析與網格資料分析') are essential for modeling climate-related hazards, assessing vulnerabilities, and integrating climate measures into planning (Targets 13.1, 13.2).
